chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-216 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For orders on M.A. No.2680/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2025 Ms. Safa Hisbani, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. == None present for the applicant in the morning. Even in the second round, no one is present. With the assistance of learned APG, the record has been scanned, who also raises objection to the instant application on the ground that there is a civil dispute between the parties. It appears that parties are disputing with respect to money transaction whereas the malafide intention of the applicant for harassing and pressurizing the respondents is evident. Perusal of record also supports such version and in this regard the principles laid down by the Hon’ble Supreme Court in the case of Munawar Alam Khan v. Qurban Ali Mallano and others [2024 SCMR 985], wherein all the circumstances so also the relationship between the parties and the possible motives have been taken into consideration, the order passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace / VIth Additional Sessions Judge Hyderabad seems to be well within the jurisdiction and after due consideration to all circumstances need not to be interfered by this Court. The instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application being devoid of merits is dismissed. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
